summary: Iteration 16: Frontend-only testing for Super Admin vs Agency Admin interface separation. All 8 core features tested and PASSED. Role-based login redirection, dashboard badge display, route protection, and logout functionality all working correctly.

issues: data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity components are not being rendered in the DOM for React Native Web (known limitation). Logout button selectors require coordinate-based clicks or JS evaluation.
Minor: Has two header bars stacked - the layout header and the page-specific 'Administration' header. Consider consolidating.

super_admin_dashboard_badge.details: Dashboard shows 'SUPER ADMIN' badge with red/dark theme. Shows 'Vue Globale' title with global stats across all agencies.

agency_admin_dashboard_badge.details: Dashboard shows 'Admin' badge (not SUPER ADMIN) with purple/violet theme. Shows agency name 'LogiRent Lausanne'. Displays agency-scoped stats.

super_admin_redirect_from_admin.details: Super admin user navigating to /admin is automatically redirected to /super-admin

super_admin_pages_accessible.details: All super admin pages load correctly with proper navigation tabs

agency_admin_pages_accessible.details: All agency admin pages load correctly. 'Agences' tab correctly NOT visible.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' warnings on users/reservations pages - likely whitespace/formatting issue in JSX
Minor: data-testid props not being passed through TouchableOpacity to DOM in React Native Web - this is a known limitation, not a bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin and Agency Admin interface separation is complete and working. Key implementation: 1) admin-login.tsx redirects based on user.role (super_admin → /super-admin, admin → /admin), 2) admin/_layout.tsx rejects super_admin users and redirects to /super-admin, 3) super-admin/_layout.tsx guards for super_admin role only. Super admin has red theme with 'SUPER ADMIN' badge, agency admin has purple theme with 'Admin' badge. Logout buttons work but require coordinate-based clicking for automated tests due to React Native Web data-testid limitation.
